# Legacy System Watchouts

**Purpose**: Document gotchas and constraints in existing code

**Format**: One gotcha per section with clear structure

---

## How to Add Gotchas

When you discover a gotcha, create a section following this template:

```markdown
## [Gotcha Name]

**What**: [Clear, specific description]
**Impact**: [What breaks if you ignore it?]
**When it matters**: [Which features/workflows affected?]
**Solution/Workaround**: [How to handle it]
**Files involved**: [Key files to know about]
**Status**: ✅ STABLE / ⚠️ NEEDS VERIFICATION / 🔴 LEGACY / ⏳ IN PROGRESS
**Confidence**: HIGH / MEDIUM / LOW (based on testing)
**Discovered**: [Date] by [Who/Agent]
**Last updated**: [Date]
```

---
